name: TraderSync
description_short: AI-enhanced trading journal with Cypher AI assistant, market replay, and comprehensive analytics across all asset classes.
description_long:
TraderSync is a feature-packed trading journal that combines traditional trade logging with AI-powered analysis through its Cypher AI assistant. The platform has grown significantly in recent years, adding sophisticated features like market replay with up to 1-second tick precision and sector-level performance reports.

The Cypher AI assistant sets TraderSync apart by offering conversational analysis of your trading patterns, answering questions about your performance, and providing actionable suggestions for improvement. Combined with detailed replay capabilities, traders can visually relive their trades while getting AI-generated insights on what went right or wrong.

TraderSync supports all major asset classes and offers auto-import from dozens of brokers. The three-tier pricing structure (Pro, Premium, Elite) lets traders pick the level of sophistication they need, from basic journaling to full AI-powered analysis with ultra-precise replay.
pros: Cypher AI assistant provides conversational trade analysis
Market replay with 1-second precision on Premium
Supports up to 20 accounts for prop firm traders
Clean, modern interface with mobile app
cons: Elite plan pricing is steep at $79.95/mo
AI message limits on lower tiers can be frustrating
